triggerTime.description: The timestamp indicating the time of balance adjustment. DateTime according to W3. yyyy-MM-ddThh:MM:ss(.SSS)TZD, where TZD = Z or +hh:mm or -hh:mm (eg 1997-07-16T19:20:30.45+01:00).

externalId.description: External identifier of the party or party role.

id.description: Unique identifier of the party or party role.

settlementAccountId.description: Represents Settlement account internal id, on which the adjustment is to be applied.

settlementAccountExternalId.description: Represents Settlement account external id, on which the adjustment is to be applied.

settlementAccountBucketSpecId.description: Represents Settlement account bucket specification internal id, on which the adjustment is to be applied.

settlementAccountBucketSpecExternalId.description: Represents Settlement account bucket specification external id, on which the adjustment is to be applied.

decimalPlaces.description: Number of decimals in the value.

action.description: Set means to set the value of the Bucket as mentioned in the amount field. Relative means to calculate the value of the Bucket with respect to the existing/current value.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure for adjustment value.

additionalInfo.description: Additional information associated with the balance adjustment activity.
